privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a new Project Type named 'Winter Garden Prep' in iDempiere with three phases: 'Pruning' (sequence 10), 'Mulching' (sequence 20), and 'Covering' (sequence 30). All metadata values are verified to be compatible with iDempiere's database schema: C_PROJECTTYPE.name is varchar(60), and C_PHASE contains seqno (numeric 10) and name (varchar 60) fields. The phase sequences follow standard ordering conventions (increments of 10). This is synthetic task-specific data created for benchmark evaluation, not existing iDempiere data.
